summary.original: Validate design-token accessibility and mathematical relationships, trace aliases, inspect dependency graphs, explain violations, and calculate read-only fixes.
summary.zhCN: 验证设计 Token 的无障碍与数学关系，追溯别名，检查依赖图，解释违规，并计算只读修复建议。

description.original: Design Constraint Validator 2.3.0 is a provenance-backed MCP server for DTCG, Style Dictionary and Tokens Studio data. Its six read-only tools validate WCAG and threshold policies, explain token provenance and relationships, enumerate active constraints, explain a violation and derive a satisfying value without writing files.
description.zhCN: Design Constraint Validator 2.3.0 是带 npm provenance 的 MCP 服务，面向 DTCG、Style Dictionary 与 Tokens Studio 数据。六个只读工具可验证 WCAG 和阈值策略、解释 Token 来源与关系、列出有效约束、解释违规，并在不写文件的前提下推导满足约束的值。

evidence.note: The official MCP Registry marks 2.3.0 as the latest active listing and binds the GitHub repository to the exact design-constraint-validator 2.3.0 npm package over stdio.

npm metadata declares MIT, Node >=18, three executable names including dcv-mcp, 212 files, 633,174 unpacked bytes, integrity sha512-Qt7j1ILVOYUjD9p5PhhrtKJGUlXnpCs11Uv6ZTjEcxke2ItKb+MqdWjucoWZUjmJQQH1a+2TdvtRxLcInbBuVw==, and gitHead b0cb2d52cf60d9fcde8d0ec012a3d3561a13e5bf.
The npm SLSA provenance attestation binds the published 2.3.0 artifact to the upstream GitHub Actions release at the recorded gitHead.

The pinned MCP implementation registers six tools: validate, why, graph, list-constraints, explain and suggest-fix. It supports inline data and optional filesystem paths; Agent-OPT exposes only the inline branches.

The pinned contracts define DTCG token objects, WCAG and threshold constraints, JSON graph output, token explanations, violation explanations and read-only fix suggestions, plus tokensPath/configPath/constraintsDir options that the Web adapter rejects.
The pinned repository contains the MIT License with 2025 Cseperke Papp copyright.

license.evidence: The exact npm artifact declares MIT and contains the same MIT license as the provenance-bound v2.3.0 source. Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package and adds independent validation and Web code.

name.zhCN: 验证无障碍与阈值策略

description.original: Evaluate inline design tokens against explicit WCAG contrast pairs and numeric min/max thresholds with structured violations.
description.zhCN: 依据明确的 WCAG 对比度组合与数值上下限，评估内联设计 Token，并返回结构化违规。

name.original: Trace token aliases and dependency graphs
name.zhCN: 追溯 Token 别名与依赖图

description.original: Explain one token's value provenance, aliases, dependencies and dependents, or return the complete directed dependency graph.
description.zhCN: 解释单个 Token 的值来源、别名、依赖与被依赖关系，或返回完整有向依赖图。

name.original: Explain violations and derive verified fixes
name.zhCN: 解释违规并推导可验证修复

description.original: List active constraints, translate a violation into plain-language facts, and calculate a satisfying WCAG or threshold value without changing the source tokens.
description.zhCN: 列出有效约束，把违规转换为易读事实，并在不修改源 Token 的情况下计算满足 WCAG 或阈值的值。

notes: A fixed Agent-OPT bootstrap launches the exact upstream Node entry point with a fixed memory limit in a project-owned empty working directory; Web callers cannot choose a command, environment variable or working directory.
The bootstrap removes proxy, registry and cloud credential variables and denies fetch, WebSocket, HTTP(S), raw sockets, datagrams and child-process APIs before importing the upstream server.

All six tools receive inline token JSON. tokensPath, configPath and constraintsDir are absent from strict public schemas, so upstream filesystem parsing and custom constraint discovery cannot be activated.
Nested JSON is limited to 180 KiB, fourteen levels, 4,000 nodes and keys, 1,000 array items and 4,000 characters per string; prototype-related keys are rejected.
WCAG ratios are bounded to the specification range, rule and violation arrays are capped, identifiers are character-limited, unknown fields fail closed, and normalized results cannot exceed 1.5 MiB.
The public surface is read-only: suggest-fix returns candidates but Agent-OPT does not expose the upstream CLI set or patch commands.

requirements: No external account, credential, network, design application or filesystem input is required

description.original: Every workflow supplies bounded token and policy JSON directly; path-based upstream inputs are unavailable.
description.zhCN: 所有工作流都直接提供有界 Token 与策略 JSON；上游基于路径的输入不可用。

notes: DCV checks mathematical and accessibility relationships rather than duplicating schema-only JSON validators or the catalog's basic color utility.
The six-tool loop is coherent: validate, inspect provenance and graph, enumerate the governing rules, explain one violation, then calculate a non-mutating candidate fix.
The Registry, npm artifact, npm provenance, release tag and repository source all agree on 2.3.0 and the exact commit.

The exact npm package is installed from package-lock.json; all six upstream tools, representative design-token scenarios, public API, bounded-input and runtime-root security controls, and the dedicated Chromium workflow passed.
Kept MCP, DTCG, Style Dictionary, Tokens Studio, WCAG, Token, JSON and alias as established terms.
The Chinese copy distinguishes read-only calculated suggestions from automatic source modification.

features: six capability tabs covering the complete upstream tool surface
side-by-side bounded DTCG token and WCAG or threshold policy editors
validation metrics, token provenance, dependency node view and active-constraint cards
violation handoff into explanation and read-only fix calculation
runtime activity, structured output, responsive layout and controlled error feedback
dedicatedElements: constraint explanation and fix result flow

tests.evidence: The installed 2.3.0 STDIO server exposed exactly validate, why, graph, list-constraints, explain and suggest-fix; one coherent review loop invoked all six and validated their structured results.
Real upstream validation distinguished failing and passing DTCG token sets across explicit WCAG contrast and numeric threshold policies.
Strict schemas rejected every upstream path option and unknown field; excessive nesting and prototype-related keys returned controlled validation errors before launch.

Tests rejected tokensPath, configPath, constraintsDir, prototype pollution, over-deep JSON and a junction/symlink runtime root; an executable probe also proved the fixed bootstrap denies network and subprocess APIs and removes proxy and credential variables.
The public invoke route executed the real validator and returned structured WCAG violations; a filesystem-shaped payload was rejected with HTTP 400.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=design-constraint.spec.ts › @web-e2e [design-constraint-studio] Design Constraint Web exercises all six tools and failures; route=/plugins/design-constraint-studio; result=passed
